last_cycle_summary: Completed a final bounded Architecture / Contracts cycle after Supervisor marked the baseline ready. Re-read V1 status/planning, confirmed the existing additive V1 facade is the first-batch contract source, fixed the promised EvalCase type export, added a focused V1 contract test over the compact fixture, guards, gate/citation helpers, audit/eval/skill conversion, BigAt parsing, and hashing, and verified TypeScript plus the focused test. No further contract edits should occur unless Architecture / Contracts is explicitly re-dispatched.

document_retrieval.instruction: Use or centrally extend the V1 facade; do not create private document, chunk, retrieval, or evidence models.

llm_runtime.instruction: Log deterministic and external model activity through AgentRun, ToolCall, and AuditEvent-compatible records.

gate_engine.instruction: Use shared gate summaries and final-export checks so final export fails closed on blocking gates.

contracts_added_or_changed: Added V1_CONTRACT_VERSION and V1 facade exports.
Added V1-only types: DocumentRecord, DocumentChunk, RetrievalResult, Claim, ObligationItem, GateSummary, V1WorkspaceFixture, V1BigAtReference, V1BigAtReferenceResolution.
Re-exported P0-compatible V1 models: Matter, EvidenceItem, IssueNode, RiskItem, DraftMemo, ReviewComment, GateResult, AuditEvent, AgentRun, ToolCall, ProfessionalSkill.

Added shared helpers: createAuditEvent, countUnsupportedClaims, summarizeGateResults, createEvalCaseFromReviewComment, createSkillCandidateFromEvalCases, hashArtifact, validateV1ArtifactShape, createV1CompactFixture.
Exposed existing shared helpers through the V1 facade: createDefaultMatter, createDefaultAgentRun, calculateCitationCoverage, canExportFinal, parseBigAtReferences, resolveBigAtReference.
Fixed the V1 facade type export so EvalCase is available from the contract source promised by V1_CONTRACTS.md.
fixtures_added: createV1CompactFixture covers Matter -> DocumentRecord -> DocumentChunk -> RetrievalResult -> EvidenceItem -> Claim -> IssueNode -> ObligationItem -> RiskItem -> DraftMemo -> GateResult.
blockers: No first-batch contract blocker remains for Document Retrieval, LLM Runtime, or Gate Engine.
Backend persistence still uses P0 repository input/output records and should be mapped to the V1 facade by feature owners before broad V1 data storage changes.
next_actions: Document Retrieval should adopt DocumentRecord, DocumentChunk, and RetrievalResult from frontend/src/aletheia/agentops/v1Contracts.ts rather than local shapes.
Gate Engine and Export agents should use summarizeGateResults and canExportFinal for final export fail-closed behavior.
Eval/Skills agents should use createEvalCaseFromReviewComment and createSkillCandidateFromEvalCases as the baseline conversion path, extending centrally if needed.
LLM Runtime should use AgentRun, ToolCall, createDefaultAgentRun, createAuditEvent, and hashArtifact for run trace and model/tool-call provenance.
Architecture / Contracts should stop further contract edits unless explicitly re-dispatched by the orchestrator or supervisor.
